So much misery in the world, thoughts go out to all affected

A Moscow-born gunman has opened fire in the Ukrainian capital of Kyiv, killing at least six people and wounding fifteen in a weapon rampage that saw him take hostages in a supermarket. Video footage appeared to show the gunman shooting at passersby in the street in the Holosiivskyi area of the city, before authorities said he entered the local store, where he was confronted by special forces. President Zelensky confirmed five people died in the shooting, while a woman in her 30s died later in the hospital from her injuries, the mayor of Kyiv Vitali ​Klitschko said.

Feed that town child in this country and it's mother would be at the school reception moaning and complaining. My Charlie only eats pizza and chips.

With the Easter holidays now over, it's back to regular programming with the school run, homework and school dinners. But while pupils in the UK may be more used to chips, chicken nuggets and baked beans - amid government plans in place to ban fried foods from canteens starting next year - children in South Korea are enjoying healthy gourmet meals with everything from noodles, salads and hearty broths on the menu daily.
  • 143 comments
  • share Social media is in awe over impressive South Korean school dinners

This comes after the Peak District National Park Authority warned visitors against getting too close, feeding or taking selfies with cows.
